texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: General terms & conditions:
texts.text: General terms & conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies.
texts.text: All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings.
texts.text: These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A NONREFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.
texts.text: A NONREFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases.
texts.text: Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals.
texts.text: No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.
texts.text: We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: HOLIDAY SURCHARGE: -Christmas Surcharge: US$ 30 per person per night on the 24th, 25th, 26th, 31st Dec 2024 and 1st Jan 2026
texts.text: HOLIDAY SURCHARGE: -Christmas Surcharge: US$ 30 per person per night on the 24th, 25th, 26th, 31st Dec 2024 and 1st Jan 2026

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Booking Terms.
texts.text: Booking Terms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request.
texts.text: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION POLICY
texts.text: CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A. Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: B. Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: C. Cancellation between 15-1day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 15-1day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT TERMS: BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL
texts.text: PAYMENT TERMS: BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Alama Camp Mara thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.
texts.text: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Alama Camp Mara thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurance
texts.text: Insurance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.
texts.text: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expense or cost arising from any incident involving clients (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.
texts.text: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expense or cost arising from any incident involving clients (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests should be aware that Alama Camp Mara Ltd will require guests to sign indemnity forms.  If guests are not willing to sign these forms, they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.
texts.text: Guests should be aware that Alama Camp Mara Ltd will require guests to sign indemnity forms.  If guests are not willing to sign these forms, they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organize appropriate insurance.
texts.text: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organize appropriate insurance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organize appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident. Alama Camp Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
texts.text: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organize appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident. Alama Camp Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.

table_cells.text: 2 nd April to 30th June, 1 st Nov to 22 nd Dec
3 rd Jan to 1 st April, 1 st October to 31 st October

grid.text: 2 nd April to 30th June, 1 st Nov to 22 nd Dec
3 rd Jan to 1 st April, 1 st October to 31 st October

table_cells.text: • Accommodation. • meals on full board (lunch, dinner & breakfast). • One sundowner. • Wifi • All taxes

• Masai Mara National Reserve fees (USD 100 per adult per day for non- residents January-June, USD 200 per person per day July - December. • Additional activities (Balloon safaris - price on request - and village visits USD 20 per adult, USD 10 per child payable directly at the village in cash). • Tips, gratuities, items of personal nature • Late departure (after 2 pm): pays extra lunch if required. Changing and toilet facilities available. • Additional meals: packed lunch USD 40 per person, extra lunch USD 50 per person

grid.text: • Accommodation. • meals on full board (lunch, dinner & breakfast). • One sundowner. • Wifi • All taxes

• Masai Mara National Reserve fees (USD 100 per adult per day for non- residents January-June, USD 200 per person per day July - December. • Additional activities (Balloon safaris - price on request - and village visits USD 20 per adult, USD 10 per child payable directly at the village in cash). • Tips, gratuities, items of personal nature • Late departure (after 2 pm): pays extra lunch if required. Changing and toilet facilities available. • Additional meals: packed lunch USD 40 per person, extra lunch USD 50 per person
